title: galeopsis ladanum subsp. villosa
intro: Galeopsis ladanum subsp. villosa, also known as woolly hemp-nettle, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in the relief of respiratory problems and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Galeopsis ladanum subsp. villosa is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
